entities.name: OIL YIELD

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The molecular variation observed among different accessions of a species

entities.name: AFLP

entities.name: PIC
entities.description: Polymorphism information content used to estimate AFLP primer informativeness

entities.name: EMR

entities.name: RP
entities.description: Resolving power used to estimate AFLP primer informativeness

entities.name: NEIGHBOUR JOINING METHOD
entities.description: A clustering method used to group accessions based on genetic diversity

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country from which 48 Pongamia pinnata accessions were collected

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India where accessions showed comparatively higher genetic diversity
